target: Battle Command desktop withdrawal forecast and withdrawal flow
flow: Strategic Map -> Army Camp -> Deployment -> Battle
verify withdrawal forecast panel is visible before pressing withdrawal
run battle at 3x long enough for frontline/objective pressure to change
verify withdrawal forecast updates from ready to warning and explains vision-point loss
press withdrawal after pressure has worsened and verify the battle can still progress to After Action
Strategic Map -> Army Camp -> Deployment -> Battle
verify battle status becomes 戦闘撤退, withdrawal button disables, 戦果報告へ appears, and After Action reports withdrawal

textIncludes: 予備と後衛を残し主力を逃がす

lateWithdrawal.note: At 3x pressure, battle had already collapsed by the time withdrawal was pressed; 戦果報告へ still appeared and After Action opened.

immediateWithdrawal.afterActionIncludes: 東方辺境防衛線から戦闘撤退した。
